highlights: Agent hierarchy and delegation operations launched (COO + specialist model).
Delegation queue now has guardrails to prevent duplicate or conflicting assignments.
Review automation added with cadence checks and routing insights.
Shared coordination logs introduced for cleaner cross-agent visibility.
releases.whyItMatters: Mithril-OS can now scale work across multiple agents while keeping operator control, visibility, and reliability.

highlights: OpenClaw queue badges and sparkline trend visuals added.
Token/cost panel shell introduced with telemetry source metadata.
Improved operator diagnostics on gateway health and session behavior.
releases.whyItMatters: Operators can understand workload state and runtime health faster, reducing blind spots during live operations.

highlights: OpenClaw page overhauled with gateway health and bindings matrix.
Tool inspector and model runtime snapshot added.
Config explorer included for rapid read-only inspection.
releases.whyItMatters: Troubleshooting and runtime verification now happen in one place instead of scattered terminal checks.

highlights: Backups and Scheduled Jobs integrated under Diagnostics.
Backup health card, retention, snapshots table, and source breakdown added.
Run Backup Now workflow improved and host permission path clarified.
releases.whyItMatters: Backup posture is now visible and actionable from the console, improving resilience and operator confidence.

highlights: Home Assistant controls added with grouped areas and dimmer support.
Entity action endpoint introduced for direct device control.
Area override mapping improved reliability for room grouping.
releases.whyItMatters: Smart-home operations became practical and reliable directly inside Mithril-OS.

highlights: Logs 2.0 with structured fields and table workflow released.
Config validator and commit timeline introduced.
Model status tiles and top-level dashboard metrics expanded.
releases.whyItMatters: Faster root-cause analysis and better day-to-day visibility for operators.

highlights: Core UI redesign delivered with improved navigation and readability.
Agents experience upgraded with markdown file explorer and cleaner tiles.
Theme polish and visual consistency upgrades completed.
releases.whyItMatters: Mithril-OS became easier to navigate, easier to operate, and more client-ready.
